title: Cynthia Tureaud's Abandonment Filing Receipt
description: A carbon-copy receipt found in the outer sleeve of the iron document box, partially protected from moisture by the box's rubber gasket. The receipt bears an Orleans Parish Assessor's Office letterhead, a date stamp of August 31, 2005, and lists the Deslonde Street parcel by lot number as 'classified abandoned — no occupant contact made.' The agent signature reads C. Tureaud. The mandatory shelter-in-place order for this sector was not lifted until September 3.
